title: Guardrails node prompt not specified
symptom: When running the workflow, the guardrails node outputs 'No prompt specified', causing the Start node's value to become undefined.
not_this_if: Prompt is correctly specified in the input field
root_cause: The guardrails node expects a prompt to be provided in an input field named 'guardrailsInput'. If this input is not correctly set, it results in the error and subsequent undefined values in the workflow.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'Prompt' parameter is set correctly
If using expressions, replace 'item' with 'first()' in the expression
Save the workflow and run it again
agent_instruction: Check the guardrails node settings and ensure the prompt is specified correctly using 'first()' in expressions.
